name: Gladiator Beast Tygerius
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣闘獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グラディアルビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ティゲル
desc: This card cannot be used as a Fusion Material Monster. When this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster, you can discard 1 "Gladiator Beast" card to add 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: This card cannot be used as a Fusion Material Monster. When this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster, you can discard 1 "Gladiator Beast" card to add 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck to your hand.

summoning: Cannot be used as a Fusion Material
